allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\([k for k in d if k.startswith\(\('breakout','pullback','reversion'\)\)]\)")

PowerShell($pids = \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).OwningProcess | Select-Object -Unique; if \($pids\) { $pids | ForEach-Object { $p = Get-Process -Id $_ -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host "PID $_ \($\($p.Name\)\)"; Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force } } else { Write-Host "No process found on port 3000" })

PowerShell($pids = \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).OwningProcess | Select-Object -Unique; if \($pids\) { $pids | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host "Killed PID $_" } } else { Write-Host "Port 3000 free" })

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen | Select-Object LocalAddress, LocalPort, OwningProcess | ForEach-Object { $proc = Get-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; [PSCustomObject]@{ Port=$_.LocalPort; PID=$_.OwningProcess; Name=$proc.Name; Path=$proc.Path } })

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3333 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Write-Output "done")
